chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Customs Reference Application Nos.1026, 1027 & 1028 of 2024 Date Order with Signature of Judge Fresh Case 1. For orders on office objections 2. For orders on CMA No.4657/2024 3. For orders on CMA No.4658/2024 4. For hearing of main case 31.03.2026 None present. These references are pending since 2024 without any progress. On 17.12.2024, following order was passed: “1. Granted. 2-5. After going through the proposed questions we are not convinced that these are properly drafted questions of law and when confronted Counsel needs time to redraft the same. At his request, time allowed. Adjourned to 28.01.2025. Office to place a copy of this order in connected cases.” On 03.02.2025 following order was passed: “None present on behalf of the Applicant nor any intimation received. The matter was kept-aside in the first round, but again in the second round nobody has turned up. Accordingly, urgent Applications are dismissed. Office to place a copy of this order in all connected SCRAS.” On 16.03.2026 following order was passed: “None present. To come up on 31.03.2026. Office is instructed to place copy hereof in the connected files.” Even today the applicant remains unrepresented without any intimation and justification, therefore, in view of the judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, these reference applications are dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may also be sent under the seal of this Court and signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. JUDGE JUDGE Asif
